name: disambiguate_work_titles_by_type_and_year
patch: If the question names a work with an ambiguous title, emit multiple short BM25-style queries targeting each plausible work-type and year: e.g. 'TITLE (film) cast', 'TITLE (YEAR film) cast', 'TITLE (miniseries) cast', 'TITLE (TV series) cast'. Keep each query compact and keyword-like; separate queries with semicolons.
gradient_intent: Move queries toward retrieving specific work pages (film/miniseries/TV) by adding type+year disambiguators so cast/credits passages are found.
preservation_intent: Do not add long natural-language phrasing or names; keep queries short and avoid adding extra unrelated keywords so already-correct short queries still match BM25 behavior.

name: expand_cast_and_credit_keywords_for_shared_cast
patch: When the question asks whether an actor/actress 'starred in', 'appeared in', or 'shared cast' across works, append compact variants using cast/credit synonyms: 'TITLE cast', 'TITLE starring', 'TITLE cast list', 'TITLE filmography credited', and also a combined query like 'TITLE1 TITLE2 shared cast appeared in both'. Separate by semicolons.
gradient_intent: Encourage retrieval of passages that list cast members or filmography entries (including ensemble casts) so shared-cast links are found.
preservation_intent: Avoid inserting candidate actor names or long descriptions; keep keyword-only queries so existing correct queries are unaffected.

name: national_team_and_home_stadium_patterns
patch: For questions about players and 'national team' or 'home matches', generate compact queries that search both player→team and team→stadium relations: e.g. 'PLAYER national team', 'PLAYER played for', 'PLAYER (country) footballer', plus 'COUNTRY national football team home stadium', 'plays most of its home matches at', 'hosts most of its home matches'. Use short keyword phrases; do not expand into full sentences.
gradient_intent: Push queries to retrieve the player's national team page and the national team's stadium/home-match wording so the stadium answer appears.
preservation_intent: Keep queries focused and concise; do not add broad geographic terms that would harm precision on already-correct examples.

name: ordinal_album_and_discography_release_query_variants
patch: When the question asks for an album 'nth' (e.g., 'eleventh') or asks about a band's numbered studio album, produce compact discography-focused queries: 'BAND discography', 'BAND "nth studio album"', 'BAND "studio album #N" release date', 'BAND "album name" release date' (if an album title emerges from first-hop). Also include short queries combining superlatives if the question describes the band (e.g., 'highest-selling Canadian heavy metal' + 'discography').
gradient_intent: Encourage retrieval of pages that list album order and release dates (discography / album pages) so the correct release date is obtainable.
preservation_intent: Do not hardcode album titles or dates; keep queries compact and avoid adding many unrelated music keywords to preserve BM25 precision on correct examples.
